channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: moeru-ai / airi
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 29,474 → 29,606 (+132) | Ranked #1
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
Language: TypeScript 2,562 stars today

item.title: QwenLM / Qwen-Agent
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 14,606 → 14,677 (+71) | Ranked #2
Agent framework and applications built upon Qwen>=3.0, featuring Function Calling, MCP, Code Interpreter, RAG, Chrome extension, etc.
Language: Python 696 stars today

item.title: microsoft / hve-core
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 542 → 562 (+20) | Ranked #3
A refined collection of Hypervelocity Engineering components (instructions, prompts, agents) to start your project off right, or upgrade your existing projects to get the most out of all Copilots
Language: PowerShell 273 stars today

item.title: Ed1s0nZ / CyberStrikeAI
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 1,592 → 1,646 (+54) | Ranked #4
CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.
Language: Go 106 stars today

item.title: inclusionAI / AReaL
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 4,386 → 4,415 (+29) | Ranked #5

Language: Python 347 stars today

item.title: lingfengQAQ / webnovel-writer
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 763 → 798 (+35) | Ranked #6
基于 Claude Code 的长篇网文辅助创作系统，解决 AI 写作中的「遗忘」和「幻觉」问题，支持 200 万字量级 连载创作。
Language: Python 90 stars today

item.title: msitarzewski / agency-agents
item.description:
